title: RFDrills
description: Adds RF-powered tools to Thermal Expansion and EnderIO
body:
*Why not upload an ancient 1.7.10 mod to Modrinth...?*

This little addon to Thermal Expansion and EnderIO adds drills and chainsaws. Drills can mine both hard materials, like stone, and soft materials, like dirt! Chainsaws can be used both as axes and as shears. Also, they are all upgradable in a similar fashion to Simply Jetpacks.

**Requires CoFHCore and either Thermal Expansion or EnderIO to run!**

FTB forum thread for suggestions and feedback: https://forum.feed-the-beast.com/threads/1-7-10-rfdrills-for-all-of-your-mining-needs.82764/

Compatible mods:

* Thermal Expansion - adds 4 tiers of tools
* Redstone Arsenal *or* Simply Jetpacks - adds the ultimate omni-tool for the Thermal Expansion line of progression
* EnderIO - adds 2 tiers of tools + an upgradeable omni-tool
* Simply Jetpacks, Redstone Armory, Extra Utilities - if these mods are installed, their items will be used as crafting ingredients
* Waila - see how much RF you need to mine a block, and your mining mode
